changeSet.author: claude-code
changeSet.comment: Create patient measure overrides table for patient-specific measure parameter customization
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_pmo_supporting_evidence ON patient_measure_overrides USING GIN (supporting_evidence);

changeSet.author: claude-code
claude-code

rollback.sql: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_pmo_calculate_next_review ON patient_measure_overrides; DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS calculate_next_review_date();
